ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar May-06-2014 Granted Per Written Order

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: REPORT, FEES
Off Calendar Apr-22-2014 Continued To May-06-14 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition For Order Declaring Decedent'S Interest In Real Property Os Property Of The Estate; And Should Be Distributed According To The Laws Of Intestacy
Off Calendar Jun-18-2013 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Ronald Marbelstone for Petitioner.

The Court stated that whatever is in the Decedent's estate should be distributed according to the laws of intestacy. The Petition for Order Declaring Decedent's Interest In Real Property As Property of The Estate, etc. was granted in part (subject to review and modification of the proposed order).

Judge: Lillian K. Sing. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy Mann.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Granted Per Written Order
